adds.rationale: Fills a thesis-named wave the watchlist has zero exposure to; ARKG is a liquid US-listed ETF basket of engineered-biology names (Ginkgo, CRISPR, Twist, Recursion) and the sector is showing concrete buildup-phase commercial signals.

news_evidence.summary: Ginkgo Bioworks launches Ginkgo Cloud Lab, a web interface giving researchers remote access to its autonomous lab infrastructure built on >70 instruments and an AI protocol agent - a tangible commercialization step for engineered-biology platform tooling.
Senti Biosciences receives FDA RMAT designation for SENTI-202, a logic-gated CAR-NK therapy - a regulatory inflection signal within the synthetic-biology therapeutics cohort that ARKG tracks.

removes.rationale: Nuclear bucket is at the 4-ticker thematic cap with URA, CCJ, NUKZ, LEU; URA (uranium-miner basket) is the most redundant since CCJ already gives concentrated uranium-miner exposure and NUKZ captures the broader nuclear-renaissance equities - exiting URA reduces thematic concentration while preserving wave exposure.

news_evidence.summary: Kairos-TVA 50MW SMR PPA for Google data centers - the nuclear thesis is intact and best captured via NUKZ (SMR/utility-aligned basket) rather than URA's miner-only construct.
DOE extended Centrus' HALEU production contract through June 2026, reinforcing that fuel-cycle exposure is better held through LEU than through a broad uranium-miner ETF.

rationale_overall: One add, one remove keeps the watchlist at the 12-ticker cap while closing the engineered-biology gap the investor profile names as a likely next wave (currently zero exposure) and trimming a redundant nuclear-miner ETF.
